message: ❓ How It Works	from: 5276709597 gwalasix
Your own virtual phone number in 30+ countries. Receive calls, send SMS, build IVR menus — all managed from Telegram.
1. Tap 🛒 Choose a Plan → pick a country → select a number
2. Pay from wallet (crypto, bank, or card)
• 📞 Bulk IVR Campaign — call hundreds of numbers with one campaign
• Forward calls to your real phone — answer anywhere
• 🤖 IVR Auto-Attendant — "Press 1 for sales, 2 for support" menus
• SMS to Telegram — receive texts right here
• 🎙️ Voicemail — custom greetings, delivered to Telegram/Email
• Browser calling — make/receive calls at https://speechcue.com/call (no app needed)
• SIP softphone — connect with any SIP app using your credentials
• 📢 Quick IVR Call — call a number with a custom voice message (TTS or audio)
• Outbound calls & forwarding — charged from wallet balance per minute
• Inbound calls & SMS — included in your plan
⭐ Pro $75/mo — 500 min, + voicemail, SIP, IVR calling, OTP
